messages.content: omg priya. pennywise just emailed me
they want to sponsor a video
Wait THE PennyWise app?? How did they find you?
$500 for a 60 second integration
What are the terms? Script approval or full creative control?
idk yet they just sent the initial pitch
should i take this deal
Ok here's what I'd do: ask about creative control. If they want to approve every word, pass. If you own the script, take it
thats what im thinking. 500 is 500 tho lol
True. Plus it validates your channel. Having a real brand sponsor is a signal to other brands
ok im gonna reply tonight and ask about creative control
Smart. Do you actually use the app? Way better if it's authentic
yeah i downloaded it like a month ago its actually decent
Then it's a no brainer. Go for it 🚀
k writing back later. thanks pri
pennywise segment is done. gonna send u the raw cut tmrw
Nice! How'd it feel? Natural or forced?
omg priya
the fintrack repo
someone wrote about it on their blog and its BLOWING UP
Wait what??
How many stars now?
like 200!!
it was at 40 last week
Are you serious right now
dead serious. ppl r actually using it
Ok this is huge. You should do a video about this on the channel
omg thats actually a good idea
but also theres like 8 new issues and 3 PRs i need to review
Welcome to open source maintenance lol
im so excited tho like actual strangers are contributing code
This is legitimately impressive. Put it on your LinkedIn
lol no vanessa would see it. keeping this quiet at work
Right right. Still though. 200 stars!
ok i gotta go review these PRs. talk tmrw?
Go go go. So proud of you
Hey! So my friend Radhika is doing a NYE house party in Cambridge, super casual. You and Leo should come! You could probably get Mia down by 8 and grab a sitter
ohh that sounds fun actually
when does it start
Starts at 9 but knowing Radhika nobody shows up before 10 lol. Her place near Inman Square
hmm idk if we can get a sitter that late on nye tho
lemme ask leo
Yeah no pressure at all! Would be fun but I totally get the sitter struggle
ok yeah we talked about it and were just gonna do a chill night in with mia
shes been so weird about bedtime this week we dont wanna risk a meltdown lol
Totally get it! Honestly staying in for NYE is the move. The older I get the more I question why going out ever seemed fun
haha RIGHT
were gonna get some champagne and do a cozy movie night thing
That sounds perfect honestly. Happy new year if I don't talk to you before! 🎉
happy new year!! have fun at the party
happy new yearrr 🥂
HAPPY NEW YEAR!! 🎉🎊 this party is chaos haha
hahaha have fun!! mia fell asleep on the couch at like 9:30
Adorable 😭 ok going back in. Love you, 2026 is our year!! 🚀
love u!! 2026 lets gooo
vanessa just emailed me
im literally in the middle of filming
have to pause everything for some client report
On a Saturday?? That's rough
whitfield group needs their Q4 report restructured by end of day
Can Derek help?
no its my model. whatever ill just push the filming
Ugh. This is exactly why I left finance
lol yeah. ok shutting down camera gonna knock this out
Go crush it. We can film tomorrow if you want
maybe. depends how long this takes
ugh this is taking forever. whole attribution section needs to be restructured
How much longer you think?
couple hours prolly
done. sent it
Nice! Now get back to the video
lol no im fried. mia and leo are coming back from the park anyway
Tomorrow morning then? I can come over and help set up
let me see how the day goes. ill text u later
K sounds good
omg
budget review was close
Wait what happened
leo wanted to go thru fintrack together
and he saw these personal savings transfers i have set up
Which ones? The house fund?
no theres a separate one. 75 a month
he was like whats this
i said it was a small emergency buffer i set up
Did he buy it?
i think so. he just said ok makes sense
but then he almost opened the project home model
Oh NO
i was like hey lets look at spending categories first and just redirected lol
Smooth. Crisis averted
barely. my heart was pounding
March 15 is so close though. Worth it
i know i know
rest of the review was fine tho. just tight all around
Holidays always do that. You'll bounce back by March
were gonna cut dining out this month
Smart. Cooking is the move anyway
ok gonna go to bed this whole thing stressed me out lol
Go sleep! You handled it perfectly
ok i finally finished updating the model with toms numbers
can u take a look
Yes send it! Been waiting for this 📊
basically at our current savings rate we hit 5% down on a 500K place by mid july
thats 25K down. were at 2800 now but w the extra 200/mo since jan we should be on track
Ok pulling it up now
Monthly payment is the big question. What did Tom quote for rates?
6.375 for 30yr fixed w 5% down. total PITI around 3650/mo
That's $1000 more than rent. Here's what I'd do: run a scenario at 10% down too. Rate drops and PMI goes away
yeah but 10% is 50K that pushes timeline to late 2027
also theres a masshousing first time buyer program w lower PMI that tom mentioned
Oh nice, that changes things. But honestly the 5% scenario looks solid. DTI ratio is fine and building equity early matters more at your age
thats what i keep thinking. even at 6.375 were building equity instead of just paying rent
Projections look sound to me. Emergency fund is separate, income supports it, timeline is realistic 💪
ok good lol now i gotta figure out how to present this to leo on our anniversary without him losing it
He is going to LOVE it. You literally built a financial model proving you can buy a house. Most Isabella thing ever 🚀
hahaha shut up. gonna clean it up this weekend and make it presentable
soooo how did the anniversary presentation go?? did he cry??
also finished the final cut on the strava video. wanna review tonight before i upload? trying to get it up before the weekend
oh and have you seen 88 Pleasant St in Arlington on zillow?? just dropped to 510k, 2br 2ba. pretty close to your range 👀
ok ladies i need help
i wanna throw leo a surprise bday dinner
his birthday is jan 25
YES. I'm in. When and where?
thinking a nice restaurant? private dining room? budget like 400-500 for deposit
Oye hermana!! YES i love this idea
i can help with decorations!!
I know a few places on the Charles. Want me to look into it?
yes please
Ok I looked into 3 places. River & Table has a private dining room for 20, $350 deposit. The food is great
ooh that looks perfect
ay the view!! me encanta
ok im gonna book it
BOOKED. river and table jan 25 7pm private room
Amazing 🙌
YESSS hermana
deposit was 350. now i need a cake and decorations
Sweet Tooth Bakery does custom cakes. My friend got one there last year
oo ok ill check it out
hermana i sent some decoration ideas to your email
just saw them love the balloon arch
jajaja i can make it!! just need supplies
just went to scout the venue this morning
its PERFECT. separate room, they have a projector for slideshows
A slideshow?? Are we doing that?
yes lol im putting together photos already
ay hermana you are too much 😭❤️
cake ordered. chocolate raspberry, happy 29th leo on top
How much?
ay thats a lot for a cake
i know but its his birthday
Guest update: 8 confirmed, 3 pending. Leo's college friends are a mess with RSVPs
lol typical
mami confirmed too! shes taking the train from hartford
decorations ordered on amazon. 85 bucks. balloons tablecloth photo banner
ill come the morning of to set up
I'll handle the playlist and coordinate arrivals. Everyone needs to be there by 6:45
ok final count 16 people
reminder: he thinks were going to dinner with priya and carmen
Got it. I'll text him day-of to make it seem real
this is going to be so good hermana
TOMORROW
im so nervous lol
Everything is set. Cake pickup 5, decorations 5:30, guests arrive 6:45, you and Leo at 7
te quiero hermana hes going to love it
ok im gonna try to sleep. pray for me lol
How is Mia.
shes good! walking everywhere now and getting into everything
Send photos.
Mi nieta. 🙏
yeah mami i know. shes doing ok though
Pray for your sister.
mami mia has a fever. daycare sent her home today
How high.
101 but going down with tylenol. shes pulling at her ear tho
Ear infection. Take her to the doctor.
dr kim confirmed ear infection. shes on amoxicillin now
Good. She will be fine. 🙏
When is Mia show at school.
dec 19 at 10:30am
I will come. Taking the train.
yay!! mia will be so excited
I arrive tomorrow 9am. Union Station.
leo will pick you up
Good.
she was so cute right?? did u see her waving at us
Yes. Very proud. ❤️
mami can you come to boston jan 25 for leos birthday dinner
its a surprise
Yes of course.
What time.
dinner is at 7 but come early so you can see mia
and mami please dont tell leo
I know how to keep a secret.
lol ok mami
I arrive Friday 24th. Can Leo pick me up.
yes but remember he doesnt know about the party
just say youre coming to see mia
Ok.
Carmen is doing ok. Pero you know how things are.
yeah i know mami
i hear you. shes strong tho she'll figure it out
Send new photos of the baby.
she started saying papa now
Ay dios mio. 🙏❤️
lol leo is losing his mind about it

Mija hablé con tu hermana hoy. She's having a hard time again this month with rent. I know things are tight for you too but do you think you could send her something? Even $50 would help. She's too proud to ask you again after last time 😔
k thanks babe
mia was so funny at daycare today
omg stop haha
that face
picking up mia at 5:30
i have a meeting til 5:45
daycare just called
mia has a fever
oh no
how high
they said someone needs to pick her up
can you go? im in a meeting with vanessa rn
yeah heading there now
ok text me when u get her
got her. shes cranky but ok
poor baby
should we call dr kim
if the fever doesnt go down by tonight yeah
leaving early. vanessa said its fine
ok cool
can you grab some children's tylenol from cvs
yeah on my way
hows she doing this morning
fever went down to 99. still pulling at her ear
ear infection probably. calling dr kim
yeah probably. poor mia
got an appointment at 2pm today
ok ill take her
ear infection. dr kim prescribed amoxicillin
ok picking it up on my way home
ok friendsgiving planning mode
i need to go to market basket and TJs this week
how many people
like 8
ok cool
im making my mac and cheese right
obviously
babe coming to bed?
in a min one more PR
thats what u said an hour ago lol
ok ok shutting the laptop now
can u take mia this morning? filming
yeah no prob
what time u done
like 11ish
ok cool well go to the park or something
Iz.
i knowww im coming
theres a bug thats driving me insane
the repo will survive without you for 8 hours
fine
got mia. shes in a MOOD
lol what happened
didnt want to leave daycare
full meltdown in the parking lot
omg
snacks usually help
already on it

oh nice
when is it
starts at 9
what about mia tho
yeah thats what i was thinking
getting a sitter on nye would be impossible
honestly im kinda down to just stay in
get some champagne and watch a movie or something
same tbh
mias been so cranky at bedtime this week i dont wanna risk it
lol yeah that meltdown on thursday was something
ok ill tell priya were staying in
sounds good babe
heading to total wine, want anyhting specific
ooh get some prosecco too
mia and i are watching bluey
got two bottles of champagne and a red
perfect
be home in 15
look at this face
stopp shes so cute
picking up mia then stopping at trader joes
get bananas were out
k

yep already up
ur the best
hey iz
so i was looking at our checking acct earlier
we should look at where we're at
like the budget?

like 2ish?
perfect
ill make coffee
deal

WHAT

yeah were good. say hi to the internet for me

one more issue i promise

babe im not swimming today
feel terrible

sore throat and my head is killing me
stay in bed ill take mia
u sure?
babe yes go back to sleep
do we have cold medicine
dont think so
k ill grab some after work
ty ❤️
mia fed and dressed. she keeps going mama sick mama sick
dropped her off. go back to sleep iz
emailing vanessa. gonna wfh
hows it going
slightly less dead
lol thats progress
leaving work getting mia
k ty
still feel awful. no swim again
im on mia duty dont worry about it
ok im like 70% human today
gonna stop at cvs. need actual cold medicine
get the daytime kind too

feeling way better. going back to the office tmrw
finally 🙌
should we take mia to the zoo this weekend
yes!! she'd love the penguins
saturday morning?
done
picking up mia. want anything from stop and shop
milk and bread pls

omg its finally warm enough
kayak this weekend??
YES
ive been waiting for this all winter
saturday morning? we can drop mia at daycare and go from watertown dam
sounds perfect babe
cant wait 🛶
hey babe random question — i was looking at credit karma and we have a hard inquiry from rockland trust?? did you apply for something?
also whats that recurring $75 transfer out of checking? it goes to some savings account i dont have on my app
just listened to your message
carmen im sorry i really wish i could help
with daycare and rent and the car payment we just dont have extra right now
no no i understand hermana
i shouldnt have asked, im sorry
dont be sorry. youre my sister
te quiero hermana ❤️
te quiero

omg thats gorgeous
jajaja thanks! took me like 3 days
oye hermana you should do a video on renters insurance
nobody our age understands it and i just had to figure mine out
thats actually a really good idea
adding it to my content list
see im your creative director now jajaja
providence is so pretty in winter
gorgeous!! i miss prov

new headphones probably. he keeps complaining about his
jajaja leo and his headphones
FELIZ NAVIDAD hermana!! 🎄❤️
feliz navidad!! wish you were here
hermana what do u think
omg carmen this is so good
gracias!! its for a coffee shop in east side
oye you should do a video on side hustles for creative people
haha speaking from experience?

that sounds amazing! you should totally go to that art show

happy valentines day!! te quiero

dinner at lucia ristorante in waltham
oooo fancy!! take pics
spring is coming hermana!!
i cant wait. this winter was so long

maybe in april? mia would love it

te quiero

ay i wish i could come!! work
take so many videos hermana
im taking the morning off for it
Good.
she killed it
IM CRYING 😭😭😭
she waved!! ay dios mio
Feliz año nuevo.
FELIZ AÑO 🎉🎉🎉 te quiero familia!!!
happy new year!!! ❤️
happy new year everyone 🎉
hermana how was your night!! did mia stay up til midnight
haha no she was out by like 9:30
we just did champagne on the couch it was perfect
Good. Send photos.
AY que linda 😭😭 she got so big

oye im still in bed jajaja providence was crazy last night
lol i bet
mias already up tho so were making pancakes
Hey Carmen! Quick question. Are you coming up to Boston anytime soon? I was thinking we could surprise Isabella with a girls night
oye yes!! i was just telling her i want to visit in april
Perfect. Let me look into restaurants. She never does anything for herself
jajaja so true. shes always planning for everybody else
Exactly. She threw that whole birthday for Leo and I don't think she's had a night out in months
hermana works too hard. ok lets plan it!!
maybe that weekend of april 11?
Checking my calendar... that works! Let me find a place
Found a great tapas place in Cambridge. Reserving for 3 on April 11?
SI!! 🎉
Done. We tell Isabella the week before so she can get Leo to cover Mia
she deserves this. te quiero priya
Love you too! This is going to be fun ❤️
hey isabella! did u hear about the BU alumni thing oct 18?
oh yeah i saw the email. u going?
thinking about it! would be fun to see everyone. lmk if u decide to go
hey its mike from 4B. fedex left a box for u by the mailboxes, i moved it inside

hey! did u see tuesday yoga moved to 7:30 starting next week?
ugh no. thats too late for me
same honestly. lmk if u find another class

oh nice!! yeah im in. should i bring anything?
hey isabella! long time. would u be willing to be a reference for me? applying at wellington partners
of course! just send me the details
ur the best. ill forward the contact info
they might reach out this week. thanks again!

ok
